% Auto-generated by scripts/p25_rule_mask_audit.py -- do not hand-edit.
% What the dispatching rules actually search. SPT ranks (job, machine) pairs
% jointly inside the policy mask; FIFO/MOR/MWKR pick a job first and can
% commit it to a machine that cannot start it now. SPT is the best rule in
% every regime, so every "best rule" comparison in the paper is clean.
\newcommand{\RuleTiedPct}{100}  % legal-machine sets that are fully tied (the tiebreak is vacuous)
\newcommand{\RuleEscapeLo}{34}\newcommand{\RuleEscapeHi}{58}  % FIFO/MOR/MWKR decisions outside the actor mask, setup-bearing regimes (%)
\newcommand{\RuleRepairMax}{18}  % most a mask-restricted repair improves FIFO/MOR/MWKR (%)
\newcommand{\RuleRepairSpt}{0.0}  % ... and SPT, the control, which is already mask-restricted (%)
\newcommand{\RuleRepairMwkr}{14}\newcommand{\RuleRepairFifo}{10}\newcommand{\RuleRepairMor}{18}  % per-rule maximum repair gain, over all regimes (%)
\newcommand{\RuleAuditSize}{10}  % the shop size the mask audit was run at (modules); E6 is 20 and 30
\newcommand{\PoolIsSptN}{5}\newcommand{\PoolN}{8}  % regimes where the 4-rule portfolio is EXACTLY SPT, per-instance
\newcommand{\CpFiveAheadRepaired}{4}\newcommand{\CpFiveDaggerN}{4}  % daggered regimes where the policy still leads a REPAIRED portfolio at 5s (published margins 1.0-4.0 h, repaired 0.8-1.9 h)
% Per-regime, for the repaired-portfolio table in the supplement:
\newcommand{\RepSPol}{194.6}\newcommand{\RepSPub}{195.6}\newcommand{\RepSRep}{195.4}\newcommand{\RepSMPub}{+1.01}\newcommand{\RepSMRep}{+0.80}  % S: policy, portfolio published, portfolio repaired, and the two margins (h)
\newcommand{\RepLSPol}{271.2}\newcommand{\RepLSPub}{275.2}\newcommand{\RepLSRep}{273.1}\newcommand{\RepLSMPub}{+4.03}\newcommand{\RepLSMRep}{+1.92}  % LS: policy, portfolio published, portfolio repaired, and the two margins (h)
\newcommand{\RepSWPol}{219.8}\newcommand{\RepSWPub}{222.2}\newcommand{\RepSWRep}{221.2}\newcommand{\RepSWMPub}{+2.38}\newcommand{\RepSWMRep}{+1.34}  % SW: policy, portfolio published, portfolio repaired, and the two margins (h)
\newcommand{\RepLSWPol}{289.0}\newcommand{\RepLSWPub}{292.6}\newcommand{\RepLSWRep}{290.0}\newcommand{\RepLSWMPub}{+3.57}\newcommand{\RepLSWMRep}{+1.02}  % LSW: policy, portfolio published, portfolio repaired, and the two margins (h)
